case_title: THIEN-AN BUI VS. WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA RODRIGUEZ--ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUI, THIEN-AN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IS A PENALTY UNDER CALIF. FINANCE CODE 2102 IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,450.00 FILED BY BUI, THIEN-AN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUI, THIEN-AN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
